commands: Expand the target market demographics to include consumers over 35 years old, as they may also be interested in health beverages.
Consider additional consumer segments such as families or older adults who prioritize health, as they could represent significant demand.
Reassess the assumptions regarding the product type to explore other beverage categories that may appeal to a broader audience, such as functional drinks or organic options.
Include a competitive analysis that not only looks at direct competitors but also indirect competitors that may influence consumer choices in the health beverage sector.
Incorporate qualitative insights from focus groups or surveys to complement the quantitative data and provide a more rounded understanding of consumer preferences.
